ab: la ikakwa so kela?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: dadavaca ko kela.
en: I came on foot.

ab: ango kai so sa manema kela?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: ango kai yako ki baase kela.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: ai ikakwa so mo kiyokai.
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: ai obeleng nakowa ko tama li.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: ko laso ango kai sa manema mwa tatakesikesiya?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: ko laso wa ango kai cie’ing mwa tatakesikesiya.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: ko kaingo so wa mobeleng sa manema mwa langai ki lacenge?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: mobeleng ki ‘otobay mwa langai laceng.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: ai ikakwa so mo Bocolo?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: ai angokai ko ki sodang mo Bocolo.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: ko talragi so la ikakwa mo Bocolo?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: wa mobeleng ki hikoki mo Bocolo.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: ango kai sa manema mo Takaw ko talragi so?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: ango kai ki kawti mo Takaw.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: kai laso ango kai ki kisiya mo Balrangaw?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: eene, ango kai ki kisiya mo Balrangaw
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: ko talragi so ango kai ki kisiya mo Balrangaw?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: ini, wa mobeleng ki hikoki mo Balrangaw.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: kai sa’agiyaisi yakai ka tawbelebelenga ki baase?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: yakai, cocobonga dadavace ai ceele so.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: kai adedethenga ka ci’yng yakai ino?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: kadrowa ka ci’yng kikai, katha ka haiya ka mobelenge so.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: lo mobeleng ta ki baase tathaino ka toki kelata ki tatakesikesiya
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: ai mangeale si lima ka bonkange kelanga ta ki tatakeiskesiya.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: lo mobeleng ta ki kawti tara tathaino ka toki kela Taiciyo?
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: aika eea ka toki akela ta ki Taiciyo.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: lo ’ongti ta sidosiya mo Olay ai mawlai?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: ikai ka eea ka toki.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: lo mobeleng so ki ci’yng kela naiyana tara tathino toki?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: ikai ka ma’osale ka bonkang.
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: wathingale so angowa ‘aliliding?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: wa thingala ko ango ’aliliding.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: yakai ka ’otobay so?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: yakai ka eea ka ‘otobay li.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: yakai ka ’otobay so?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: kadrowa ka ’otobay li.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
